title: rubus longistachys
intro: Rubus longistachys, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Chinese raspberry, is a type of plant belonging to the rose family, characterized by its edible fruits and medicinal properties. The plant's roots, leaves, and fruits are used in traditional medicine, exhibiting antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus longistachys include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism and arthritis, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of Rubus longistachys include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
